sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for this title

special_mechanics.name: Motorcycle Physics
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a motorcycle racer with acceleration, braking, and steering mechanics. Different bikes have varying weights, speeds, and steering capabilities that can be purchased between races.

physics_values.notes: Game mechanics center on motorcycle racing rather than platformer physics

special_mechanics.name: Combat System
special_mechanics.description: On-bike combat with punches, backhand strikes, and kicks against opponents. Can acquire and use weapons (clubs) dropped by defeated opponents.

special_mechanics.name: Ejection Mechanics
special_mechanics.description: Player character ejected from bike upon crash with obstacles or stamina depletion. Character must run back to bike while avoiding traffic.

physics_values.bike_damage_meter: Decreases with each crash; full depletion ends race participation

tier_notes: Road Rash is primarily a motorcycle racing game with combat elements, not a platformer. Traditional movement physics parameters (jump, gravity, acceleration rates) are not applicable. Tier 2 classification reflects available qualitative gameplay documentation without access to ROM-level physics constants or detailed frame-data analysis.
